kill_fact: No kill_fact found. Every adversarial attack vector was tested and the bear case held against primary sources, so the debate's bearish PASS-at-$87 verdict (C, conviction 2) survives. (a) STALE-ANCHOR: the $58-64 SoP is built on CURRENT financials — FY2025 rev $443.5M/+6% and Q1-26 $108.3M are the latest reported, not pre-event. (b) NUMBER TRUTH: all load-bearing figures verify — FY2025 rev $443.5M (+6%), GAAP EPS $0.39, Q1-26 rev $108.3M (+3% YoY), Q2-26 guide ~$117.5M (+8.5%), new $50M buyback after prior $50M completed, fortress net-cash balance sheet. (c)/(d): the crown-jewel AI claim is the WEAKEST link and it confirms the bear — POWI is NOT sole-source (TI unveiled a COMPLETE 800VDC architecture WITH NVIDIA at GTC, 2026-03-16, per TI's own newsroom), near-term DC content is only 15W/35W aux 'control and housekeeping' PSUs (DER-1110/DER-1114, BusinessWire 2026-05-31), main-power GaN is 'a couple years out' per management, and DC revenue is ~zero today. The premium at the 52-week high pays for an unbooked, deferred, contested option — exactly the bear's claim.
corrections: Q1-26 non-GAAP gross margin was 53.5% (per the Q1-26 call), NOT the 'low-54s/54.5%' stated in several places in the debate (sop, interrogator). This is a MINOR correction that strengthens the bear (margin is even softer vs the high-50s history) and does not change the verdict. Also: total restructuring charges cited on the call were ~$6.6M, not $6.2M (immaterial). FY2025 GAAP EPS is $0.39 (correctly noted in the dossier; one bull-thesis line implies a different prior-year comp but the $0.39 figure is right).
evidence: TI.com newsroom, 2026-03-16: 'TI unveils complete 800 VDC power architecture for future generation AI data centers with NVIDIA' (GTC Mar 16-19, 2026) — confirms POWI is one of several NVIDIA 800VDC power suppliers, not sole-source.

BusinessWire, 2026-05-31: 'Power Integrations Unveils Space-Saving, Ultra-Slim Auxiliary PSU Reference Designs for NVIDIA Kyber 800 VDC' — DER-1110 (15W) / DER-1114 (35W) for 'control and housekeeping'; confirms near-term DC content is small aux sockets, not main power.

Power Integrations FY2025 results (Morningstar/BusinessWire & SEC 8-K, 2026-02-05): full-year revenue $443.5M (+6%), GAAP net income $22.1M / $0.39 diluted EPS, CFO $111.5M, new $50M buyback after completing prior $50M — verifies the fortress-balance-sheet and base-growth figures.

POWI Q1-26 earnings call (2026-05, via Investing.com transcript): mgmt — 'data center SAM, including rack and grid applications, will exceed $1 billion by 2030'; main-power GaN 'not next year... in a couple years'; non-GAAP gross margin 53.5%, Q2 guide 54-55%; 2 new aux design wins at Taiwan customers.
